texto: Like anyone, you could love someone, and it doesn't mean that you're equipped or you were taught or have the patience or the love or the wherewithal to be a good parent. One has nothing to do with the other.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elizabeth Rodriguez: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Like anyone, you could love someone, and it doesn't mean that you're equipped or you were taught …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e parent.
